quote: Do not be arrogant because of your knowledge.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: Good speech is more hidden than greenstone, yet it may be found among servant girls at the grindstones.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: If you are powerful, gain respect through knowledge and gentleness of speech.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: Do not repeat extravagant speech, neither listen to it.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: Follow your heart as long as you live.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: The obedient person is one whom the gods love.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: Do not be proud because you are learned.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: Listening is better than speaking.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: One plans, but God directs.
author: Amenemope

quote: Better is poverty in the hand of God than wealth in the storehouse.
author: Amenemope

quote: Do not set your heart on wealth.
author: Amenemope

quote: The tongue of a man is the rudder of a boat.
author: Amenemope

quote: Better is bread with a happy heart than wealth with vexation.
author: Amenemope

quote: Do not laugh at a blind man.
author: Amenemope

quote: Do not remove the landmark from the borders of the fields.
author: Amenemope

quote: A good character is more valuable than riches.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Truth is the foundation of life.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Justice brings prosperity.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Knowledge is a treasure that follows its owner everywhere.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: A peaceful heart is worth more than gold.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: He who obeys his heart will not fail.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: Silence is more profitable than abundance of speech.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: The wise man listens before he speaks.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: Respect is earned through character.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: Do not answer a hot-headed man with anger.
author: Ptahhotep

quote: A calm tongue is the companion of wisdom.
author: Amenemope

quote: Better is honesty than temporary gain.
author: Amenemope

quote: Do not exploit the weak.
author: Amenemope

quote: The patient man reaches his goal.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: A truthful tongue never fears judgment.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Great deeds begin with small steps.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Wisdom increases when shared.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: The heart guides the path of a person.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Patience overcomes difficulties.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Honor is more precious than gold.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: A kind word opens closed doors.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: The just person leaves a lasting legacy.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Knowledge shines brighter than jewels.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Good conduct is remembered forever.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Humility is the mark of true greatness.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: The wise learn from every experience.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Justice is stronger than force.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: The future belongs to those who prepare.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Speak only when your words improve silence.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Integrity is wealth that cannot be stolen.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Every day is an opportunity to learn.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: The strongest foundation is truth.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: A noble heart brings peace.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Respect others and you will be respected.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom

quote: Goodness remains after wealth disappears.
author: Ancient Egyptian Wisdom
